blocks.body: A **Higher-Order Component** is a function that takes a component and returns a new component with additional behavior. It is the component equivalent of a decorator. While hooks have replaced most HOC use cases, you will encounter them in older codebases and some libraries.

HOCs add a layer of indirection that makes debugging harder. Prefer custom hooks for new code. The main place you still see HOCs is in older React codebases and a few libraries like Redux's `connect()` function.
